final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand color palette and typography specification sheet for the fragrance brand "染秋 (RAN QIU)".

Style/medium: needs an East-Asian editorial brand-guidelines aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a structured spec sheet layout showing primary colors, secondary/accent colors, and typography samples in clearly divided sections
Subject: must include:
  - Primary color swatches for the 染秋 brand (warm autumnal tones derived from 桂花, 柿子, 枫叶, 乌龙茶)
  - Secondary/accent color swatches (drawing from 肉桂, 檀香, 琥珀 tones)
  - Typography specimens showing the brand name "染秋" and "RAN QIU" in both Chinese and Latin typefaces
  - Color codes (HEX or similar) labeled beneath each swatch
  - Font name labels and weight/style samples
Scene/backdrop: needs a refined, minimal brand-sheet backdrop — exact paper tone and texture are yours
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, poetic autumn atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a warm autumnal East-Asian direction — anchored in deep amber, osmanthus gold, persimmon orange, maple red, dark oolong brown, with muted dusty neutrals as supporting tones — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a refined print-material feel evoking traditional 染 (dyeing) craft — exact surface treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): must include:
  - "染秋" (brand name, large display)
  - "RAN QIU" (Latin transliteration)
  - "主色" (primary colors section label)
  - "辅色" (secondary colors section label)
  - "字体规范" (typography section label)
  - Core series names: "桂花乌龙" / "琥珀枫叶" / "柿霜暮色"
Constraints: must preserve brand philosophy rooted in 东方哲学 and traditional 染 craft aesthetic; all three core series names must appear; color and type sections must be visually distinct
Avoid: overly Western minimalist cold palette; neon or synthetic colors unrelated to natural autumn botanicals
